identity.emotional_tone: Effortless Power, Professional Polish, Creative Magic

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-md shadow-lg shadow-indigo-500/20 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-md border border-zinc-700 transition-all
buttons.magic: bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-500 to-violet-500 hover:from-indigo-400 hover:to-violet-400 text-white font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-lg shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 flex items-center gap-2
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

cards.default: bg-zinc-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-indigo-500/30 transition-all cursor-pointer hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-indigo-500/10
cards.glass: bg-zinc-950/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-xl

inputs.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-zinc-100 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/50 focus:border-indigo-500 transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600
inputs.minimal: bg-transparent border-b border-zinc-800 rounded-none px-0 py-2 text-zinc-100 focus:outline-none focus:border-indigo-500 transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600

gradients.hero_glow: absolute top-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[800px] h-[400px] bg-indigo-600/20 blur-[100px] rounded-full pointer-events-none
gradients.card_hover: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-tr from-indigo-500/5 to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity pointer-events-none

placeholders.alt: Tutorial Thumbnail - Man working on laptop

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-primary on surface meets WCAG AA (4.5:1). Use 'text-zinc-50' on 'bg-zinc-900'.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements MUST have visible focus ring: 'focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500'

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'DM Sans' for body.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use Zinc-950 (#09090b) for backgrounds.
Do NOT use gradient text for body content. Only for short, high-impact headings.
Use 'gap-6' or 'gap-8' for breathing room. Avoid cramped layouts.
Interactive elements must have a defined hover state (color change or scale).
All buttons must have 'active:scale-95' for tactile feedback.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts using the installation_command in typography section.
Update tailwind.config.js to extend the theme with the provided color palette (zinc based).
Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the app with the dark theme background and noise texture.
For the 'Magic Button', use the 'components.buttons.magic' classes.
For the Dashboard, use the 'dashboard_bento' grid system.
Refer to 'visual_enhancers' for adding polish (glows, shadows) to the Editor interface.
